channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffitti on green virgin box, 10th March
item.description:
On virgin box.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wellan Close, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bushes and tree branches overhanging, 10th March
item.description:
Encroaching on the pavement all along the stretch of Picketts Lock Lane walking up to the bus stop the bushes are stopping 2 people to walk side by side safely people have to step out into the road to let someone pass because the bushes and tree branches are over hanging the pavement and some branches are at eye level it makes the pavement difficult to walk for blind and partially sighted people. Needs trimming back.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hudson Way, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car with flat tyres and no MOT or tax, 10th March
item.description:
This car has been parked in same plave for months. Both front tyres are flat, it is not taxed (expired April 2022) nor has a vaild MOT

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunbar Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Further dumping of rubbish, 10th March
item.description:
A very large empty box and some gas canisters have been dumped by our bins; we are currently having rubbish dumped every few days in front of our home and our bins filled with large bags of rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wild's Rents, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bins not emptied and street covered in rubbish. Our normal road sweeper is not been around and no one else seems to have been to empty a bin or sweep the street or clear the green areas., 10th March
item.description:
Liverpool Grove has not been cleaned in days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Liverpool Grove, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping again., 10th March
item.description:
Right on cue our lovely local HMO has dumped all their household rubbish in the usual spot. This is because their bins are hardly ever emptied because they’re always contaminated and overflowing. As most HMO’s do.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talbot Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge flytip on Picketts Lock Lane again, 10th March
item.description:
Huge pile of wood flooring been dumped on the road and there is a big orange calor gas bottle laying on the grass verge.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Picketts Lock Lane, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed humps outside number 26, 10th March
item.description:
Two potholes on these speed humps (please see photo) Many thanks for inspecting

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mapesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Expose wires from a street lamp

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Anerley Station Road, Anerley, Greater London

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mapesbury Road, London

item.title: Sunken tarmac around drains, 10th March
item.description:
Causing noise nuisances especially when big trucks go over them they’ve been here 1 month

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Copers Cope Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Follow-up: Loose manhole cover – Victoria Park Road, 10th March
item.description:
I am following up on my report about the loose manhole cover on Victoria Park Road outside the Banbury Estate. The cover now appears to be even looser and makes a very loud clanging noise each time vehicles drive over it. The noise is clearly audible

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
